title: Fixes #12220: Document 3D Generation End-to-End
author: sharktide
pr_body_excerpt: self explanatory, documents the new 3d generation that was introduced in #12048, #12179, #12188, and #12190

gist.headline: The third dimension has docs
gist.blurb: 3D generation now has a proper trail of breadcrumbs, from quick start to model details. The hive has labeled the extra axis.
gist.summary: Documented Pollinations 3D generation end-to-end with a dedicated guide, model reference entry, quick-start examples, and updated docs routes.
gist.impact: Developers can now find the 3D generation workflow, available model information, and starter requests directly in the Pollinations documentation.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly as a tiny explorer wearing round cartographer glasses, following a clearly marked pixel path from a retro terminal into a cozy miniature 3D garden of blocky cubes, spheres, and code-plants. A friendly CRT monitor robot holds an unfolded guide map, while flowers and vines make the formerly mysterious third dimension feel approachable.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny cartographer glasses, studying a glowing 3D generation guide beside a friendly CRT monitor robot holding a map; blocky cubes, spheres, and code-plants bloom from a lime green (#ecf874) garden path. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley, with simple pixel-font text: "3D GUIDE".

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny cartographer glasses, studying a glowing 3D generation guide beside a friendly CRT monitor robot holding a map; blocky cubes, spheres, and code-plants bloom from a lime green (#ecf874) garden path. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley, with simple pixel-font text: "3D GUIDE".
